name: creamlon-postcard
description: Playable Creamlon Postcard demo: one-time credential tasks and signed delivery proofs.

scripts.check: node --check vendor/server.mjs && node --check scripts/redeem-purchase.mjs && node --check scripts/submit-private-postcard.mjs && node --check scripts/auto-deliver.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/postcard-renderer.mjs && node --check tools/build.js
